title.en: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Life One Wireless
title.zh: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Life One Wireless
title.th: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Life One Wireless

summary.th: ขาย: 1 นอน 35 ตร.ม. ราคา 7,800,000 บาท (DotProperty #b021f50709f6-2c9e-1582-915a-c5f4a089)

description.en:
Life One Wireless – Modern 1-Bedroom Condo with Stunning City View
Discover comfortable city living in this well-designed 1-bedroom condominium at Life One Wireless, located on the 22nd floor with a beautiful city view.
Offering 36 sq.m. of functional living space, this unit is perfect for professionals, couples, or investors looking for a property in one of Bangkok's most desirable locations. The layout maximizes every square meter, providing a bright living area, a comfortable bedroom, and large windows that bring in natural light while showcasing the vibrant city skyline.
Property Details

Project: Life One Wireless
Property Type: Condominium
Size: 36 SQ.M.
Bedroom: 1
Floor: 22
View: City View
Asking Price: THB 7,500,000

Enjoy convenient access to Bangkok's CBD, shopping malls, restaurants, office buildings, and public transportation, making this an excellent choice for both owner-occupiers and investors.
Contact us today to arrange a viewing or request more information.
description.zh: 来自 DotProperty 挂牌 b021f50709f6-2c9e-1582-915a-c5f4a089。规格与价格取自公开详情页 ld+json。

description.en:
Premium facilities including a swimming pool, For Sale | Life One Wireless
Modern 1-bedroom condominium in one of Bangkok's most prestigious neighborhoods.
Property Details

1 Bedroom
1 Bathroom
35 sq.m.
12A Floor
Functional layout with comfortable living space
Ideal for both owner-occupiers and investors

Project Highlights

Prime Wireless Road location in the heart of Bangkok
Close to BTS Ploenchit
Easy access to Central Embassy, Central Chidlom, One Bangkok, and Lumphini Park
fitness center, co-working space, sky lounge, and 24-hour security



Selling Price: THB 6,290,000
For more information or to arrange a viewing, please feel free to contact us.
